programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Do The Koopa/Kootie Pie Rocks
programme.desc: Mario and his friends set out for Darkland and the Temple of Gloom./Mario, Luigi and the Princess go to the real world to see Milli Vanilli in concert.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario Meets Koop-Zilla
programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: In Lava Land, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool using a variety of floating rafts to reach an island named WakiWaki in the middle of the ocean

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Fukushima: Robots in Hell
programme.desc: In March 2011, an earthquake and tsunami led to the most serious nuclear accident of the century: Fukushima.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: A powerful earthquake and tsunami will some day devastate the Pacific Northwest. What can we do to prepare?

programme.title: House Hazards
programme.desc: The grass is not greener when the wheels of domestic disaster are set in motion by the House Hazards team.

programme.title: House Hazards
programme.desc: the House Hazards experts show how renovations can turn into wrecks in the hands of the not-so-handy.

programme.title: House Hazards
programme.desc: The House Hazards team simulate a few natural disasters and find you can never have enough weatherproofing.

programme.title: House Hazards
programme.desc: The House Hazards domestic scientists put a buzz kill on the handiness of table saws.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 1
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person be propelled off a toilet seat by dropping a lit cigarette into it when filled with combustible materials? Is running better than walking to keep dry in the rain?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a car in which a person has died and started to decay become so malodorous that it is be impossible to remove the stench and sell?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 185
programme.desc: Is it possible to re-inflate a flat tire and re-seat it on its rim? How effective are various handgun firing stances?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 153
programme.desc: Can a person be launched 115 feet into a kiddie pool from a giant waterslide? Can a mail delivery truck taking only right turns save gas?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 100
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a water heater explode and shoot through the roof of a house? If a person is being dragged by a horse, can the friction caused by the movement make the jeans catch on fire?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Failed 5 Times?
programme.desc: Did Everett touch his girlfriend Michelle’s daughter? Her ex Robert says that his 7-year-old daughter said so. Everett will take a lie detector test to disprove it! Don’t miss these shocking results!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do You Need a Medic or Are You Guilty?
programme.desc: Michelle needs answers about who hurt her daughter. She will stop at nothing to protect her baby. Will the father James clear his name on Steve's stage?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Six men and six women try to impress head chef Gordon Ramsay to earn a post as executive chef of a fine restaurant in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Both teams face setbacks, as stress cracks one wannabe chef for good, while another gets pulled from the kitchen.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each of the teams is committed to giving its best and bringing to light the opponent's weak points in a race against time in which communication at the stove becomes fundamental.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay switches up the groups in the hope of helping them out and selects another contestant to leave.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay has a new task for the remaining contestants. He asks them to prepare a complete dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay calls the participants to the Grand Central Market in Los Angeles, where he asks them to prepare a three-course meal using fresh ingredients.

programme.title: Moesha: Homecoming
programme.desc: With a little help from Myles and a visit from Grandma Mitchell, Moesha moves back home and returns to Crenshaw High.

programme.title: Moesha: Hello! What’s This?
programme.desc: Dee finds a joint in the couch while cleaning the house. Frank and Dee assume and accuse Mo, but Moesha is shocked when she catches Myles smoking.

programme.title: Moesha: Psyche Your Mind
programme.desc: Based on the family turmoil, the family begins counseling, but Moesha doesn’t want to air the family’s 'dirty laundry'.

programme.title: Moesha: Teacher
programme.desc: Moesha is attracted to a substitute teacher at Crenshaw. After they kiss, he leaves the school for 'personal reasons'.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Undercover Episode
programme.desc: After Mona discovers Dee Dee has secretly gotten back together with her older exboyfriend Carter, she is disappointed that Dee Dee didn’t trust her enough to tell her.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Doormat No More Episode
programme.desc: After telling Mona not to let people take advantage of her, Dee Dee later regrets giving her that advice when she asks Mona a favor and is turned down.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Who's Wooing Who? Episode
programme.desc: When Mona is courted and gets a job offer from another record label, she has to make a choice between staying at Delicious Records or moving on. Meanwhile, in order to keep up with the Jones’, Big Dee Dee plans an extravagant birthday party for Drew.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Thorne In My Side Episode
programme.desc: When Phyllis gets into trouble with her Homeowner's Association, Dee Dee comes to her defense, but ends up causing more harm than good.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Pomp And Circumstance Episode
programme.desc: Dee Dee starts to feel the pressure as her law school graduation fast approaches and she hasn't landed a job. Meanwhile, Mona panics when Phyllis finds a terrific apartment in her neighborhood.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Gen-Why Me Episode
programme.desc: When Charles cuts Dee Dee off financially after she announces she wants to go back and get another degree, Dee Dee must get a 'regular' job and face life in the real world.

programme.title: Half & Half: The Big Dollars And Sense Episode
programme.desc: With her new found independence in tow, Dee Dee enlists Phyllis's help in learning the value of a dollar. Mona and Spencer bump heads when Spencer goes above Mona to sign a new music act she doesn't approve of.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whip It Good
programme.desc: With a motocross bike and a rare stock whip up for grabs, Ton and Allen face one of their toughest competitors yet: their former employee Carolyn, who knows all their tricks, has money to burn and is out for revenge.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Fall Guys
programme.desc: The pressures of running a shop are taking a toll on Ton and Allen and not even the discovery of a stunt-man's fall bag can ease the tension. When things get heated, Ton abandons the partnership and leaves town.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Foos You Lose
programme.desc: When their truck breaks down, Ton and Allen lay it all on the line to raise money to fix her. They score a Foosball table, Tommy Gun drums and to Ton's delight, a treasure trove of Twinkies, but will it be enough?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Haff-Inated
programme.desc: Allen's off his game without his morning coffee, but some fun items help him re-energize. The guys find a wrestling ring, and when Allen uncovers vintage animatronics, they remind him of his days as a theme park boat captain.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Battle Bought
programme.desc: Mint 1800s French "Harmonica Pistol" and a collection of '90s remote controlled combat robots.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Unsinkable Ton
programme.desc: Unique finds lead the guys to some cool sales. They try to authenticate props from the film Titanic, Ton faces off with a rattler during a snakebite kit sale, and Allen gets into ice carving while unloading some chainsaws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: A professor leads the kids to a spirit library in the middle of the desert, where Sokka hopes to discover powerful secrets to use against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: Aang searches for Appa, while Katara struggles to keep everyone together so they can survive in the vast desert. Meanwhile, Uncle and Zuko seek help from an ancient secret society.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the kids can't take the easy way into Ba Sing Se, they must escort a family of refugees there the hard way, through the deadly Serpent's Pass.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: Aang discovers a colossal Fire Nation invention heading for Ba Sing Se, and the kids must stop it before it destroys the great wall that protects the city.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang and the kids finally arrive in Ba Sing Se to see the Earth King, only to find mysterious forces within the city conspiring to stop them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: A series of short stories that explore the individual adventures of Katara and Toph, Uncle, Sokka, Aang, Zuko, and Momo.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: In this special episode, we go back in time to the moment Appa was stolen.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: While searching for Appa, the kids run into Jet but are torn about whether to trust him or not. Meanwhile, Zuko also hunts for Appa.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids battle Long Feng when they try to show the Earth King the conspiracy taking place in his city. Zuko becomes seriously ill and has odd dreams as he faces a spiritual crisis.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: A guru at the Eastern Air Temple helps Aang take the next step in his Avatar journey. Plus, Sokka meets his long-lost father, Azula hatches a diabolical plan, and Uncle and Zuko open a tea shop.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Shackleton
programme.desc: Wendy Shackleton plans to scour her home for collectables that can be sold at auction.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Walsh
programme.desc: Tim and Zorina Walsh search for items in their beautiful 15th-century Isle of Wight home.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Bessey
programme.desc: Mike and Dorothy hope to raise money to fund horse-riding lessons for their grandchildren.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Blandford
programme.desc: Rosa wants to sell items of her father's mementos he collected between 1890 and 1930.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: B White
programme.desc: In Hastings, Barbara hopes to raise funds for her childrens' university fees.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Cheshire
programme.desc: Joy Cheshire wants to sell the memorabilia she collected with her husband David.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: A man gets a last-chance job coaching a small-town Indiana high-school basketball team and faces the dual challenge of bringing this underdog team to the 1951 state championship and redeeming himself from a mysterious past.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 1
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour is in Indiana for the WPT Hollywood Poker Open, and Erik Seidel headlines the final table.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Hollywood Poker Open - Part 2
programme.desc: The WPT Hollywood Poker Open is down to three players, with Erik Seidel, Mike Scarborough, and William Reynolds.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown
programme.desc: More than $1.1 million is up for grabs as the first-place prize in the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Showdown, with Tommy Vedes and Allen Bari at the final table.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT World Championship
programme.desc: Season IX comes to an end with the prestigious WPT World Championship from Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: For his enemies, the sword! For his princess, devotion! Hercules the mighty descended from the heavens, half-god and half-mortal, unleashed against the forces of evil as he quests to find the woman he loves.

programme.title: Find the Lady
programme.desc: Two gun toting hoodlums, Trigger (Mickey Rooney) & Leo (Dick Emery) are hired by the unscrupulous J.K. (Peter Cook) to kidnap his niece Victoria. What follows is lunacy on a scale rarely seen!

programme.title: The Raven
programme.desc: The sorcerer Craven learns from fellow magician Dr. Bedlo that his supposedly dead wife is alive and living at the castle of master sorcerer Dr. Scarabus.

programme.title: Kung Fu Gold
programme.desc: A gold miner returns to his hometown to arrange marriages for his fellow miners. He discovers that his own sweetheart was murdered by a corrupt army officer, and he teams up with a rebel fighter to defeat him. (1974)

programme.title: Union Bound
programme.desc: Union Bound is a thrilling Civil War film that shows the strength and courage of the human spirit. Sergeant Joseph Hoover went to war to preserve the Union but finds himself captured and sent to a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: WARRIOR tells the moving and inspirational story of the Conlon family, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) and Paddy (Nick Nolte), who find redemption in the ring as they fight to repair themselves and their family.

programme.title: Clover Bend
programme.desc: An LA cop whose wife is killed in a shootout moves back to his hometown, trying to rebuild a life for himself and his children. Unbeknownst to him, his wife's killers are seeking revenge for one of their own who was also killed in the shootout.

programme.title: American Exit
programme.desc: A dying father takes a road trip with his son, to try to rebuild his relationship before he dies.

programme.desc: Ironside insists on having concrete evidence against a woman (Anne Baxter) accused of killing her spouse.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Chop Shop
programme.desc: Detective Victor Isbecki's cover is blown during an investigation of a dangerous car theft ring and he becomes a hostage. Cagney and Lacey must work to help save him while coming to terms with their own failures in the investigation.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Let Them Eat Pretzels
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey find what should be a simple hit-and-run accident becomes deeply complicated when the son of a diplomat becomes involved. The team must figure out how to arrest the son, while the father attempts to stop them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gang's All There
programme.desc: While out at a bar celebrating Petrie's promotion, the 14th precinct is robbed of their guns, shields, and possessions. The team then works furiously to find the perpetrators after they become the laughing stock of the entire NYPD.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Cry For Help
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are assigned to investigate a wife-beating case and discover that the victim's husband is a cop and former classmate of Lacey's. Meanwhile the team also has to find a way to charge a con man after they are forced to let him go.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Informant
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey run into an issue with their drug investigation when it turns out that their teenage informant is a perpetrator of the crimes himself. They are then faced with the dilemma of releasing a one criminal in order to arrest another.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Love can be beautiful, love can be blind and love can be deadly. Desire and jealousy are powerful forces driving women to dark and horrifying places in their minds.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: When the small community of Noel, Missouri discovered their bank was robbed, they're shocked. When the bank president turned up missing, they're outraged. And when clues began to surface the facts were more terrible than anyone could have guessed.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Predator
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Stranger
programme.desc: The body of a young woman found burned in a truck launched a manhunt to find her killer. When more bodies began to turn up across the country, the FBI believed the cases were linked. Investigators had a suspect. They just couldn't find him.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Six Degrees of Separation
programme.desc: A college graduate strikes up a relationship with her superior at a new job. When he becomes abusive, her attempts to escape prove to be no match for the highly trained investigator.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Cases
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Burning Evidence
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Blood
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Witness To Terror
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a black box.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bullet With My Name On It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the “victim” could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Arrivaderci, Odie/Gort Goes Good/Feeling Feline
programme.desc: Garfield becomes guilt ridden when he believes he has caused Jon to get rid of Odie./One of Orson's older brothers decides to turn honest./Jon thinks he's acting too much like Garfield.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Bear Facts/Nothing To Be Afraid/The Big Talker
programme.desc: Garfield runs into a bear and Binky./The crew try to find one item that Wade will not be afraid of./Garfield makes a local talk show host regret his anti-cat comments.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Cactus Makes Perfect/Hogules 2/Crime and Nourishment
programme.desc: Jon, Garfield and Odie visit Cactus Jake./When Roy and Wade have a fight, Orson wonders what Hogcules would do./Garfield discovers a secret world inside a tree.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: TV of Tomorrow/Little Red Riding Egg/The Well Fed Feline
programme.desc: Jon buys a new TV set when his old one breaks./Orson decides to make his own movie./Animal activist thinks Garfield is starving.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel
programme.desc: Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: First Class Feline/Hamelot/How to be funny
programme.desc: Garfield's plan to send Nermal to Abu Dhabi fails./Orson dreams about the knights of the round table./Garfield lectures on what humor is.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon
programme.desc: Garfield discovers a famous "haunted house" attraction is closed./Wade inadvertently defeats a local weasel./Jon discovers he is related to a traitor of George Washington.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: China Cat/Cock-A-Doodle Dandy/Beach Blanket Bonzo
programme.desc: Jon and Garfield hear the story of the dragon and the cat./Roy's Morning bugle keeps waking up an angry bear./Garfield's attempt at a beach romance are hindered.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Lemon Aid/Hog Noon/Video Airlines
programme.desc: Jon wins a free car./A school mate is coming back to settle an old score./Jon decides to go to a video store.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Mail Animal/Peanut-Brained Rooster/Mummy Dearest
programme.desc: Garfield gets their mailman fired./Roy can't get enough of the latest crop of peanuts./Garfield dreams he's in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: On the Case: Vanished in the Night
programme.desc: When 20 year old Lynsie Ekelund suddenly goes missing in the dead of night, it leaves her mother scrambling for answers.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Lies
programme.desc: After a college student is found stabbed to death in her off-campus apartment, it may take a second murder to solve her case.

programme.title: On the Case: Evidence Never Lies
programme.desc: A young woman is found drowned in her bathtub and the evidence at the crime scene indicates her killer was someone she knew and trusted.

programme.title: On the Case: Evidence of Deception
programme.desc: When a beautiful college coed is found dead in her dorm room police discover a crime scene where nothing is what it appears to be.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: On the Case: The Smallest of Clues
programme.desc: A burned out car and a blood-stained bedroom reveal the chilling murder of a community pillar. Will it be the smallest of clues that lead police to her heartless killer?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Too Young To Die
programme.desc: A frenzied ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old boy dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through a mountain of rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Where is Claudia Jane
programme.desc: 15-year old CJ Bates is reported missing, and Kenda must investigate the mysterious circumstances behind disappearance of the teenager.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood From A Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. When a toddler is kidnapped for ransom Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death
programme.desc: When police discover the lifeless bodies of Sophia Gerardo, four children and a house cat, they suspect ritualistic mass murder. But Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers a reality far more frightening.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Chess Nuts
programme.desc: Oscar learns that Felix was a nationally ranked chess player as a child and convinces him to return to the game to make money.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Odd Man Out
programme.desc: Felix forces Oscar and Emily to go on a date to get to know each other better in the hope that they'll become friends.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Road Scholar
programme.desc: In an attempt to surprise Emily, Felix gets his learner's permit and enlists his friends to help him learn how to drive.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: All The Residents' Men
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix run a heated campaign for President of their building's tenants' association, but Oscar doesn't fully realize everything the position entails.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ex-Factor
programme.desc: When Murph persuades Oscar to try online dating, Oscar finds himself on a blind date with Felix's ex-wife, Ashley (Christine Woods).

programme.title: The Odd Couple: London Calling
programme.desc: Oscar is forced to choose between his romantic plans with Charlotte (Teri Hatcher) and helping to save Felix's relationship as Emily decides to extend her stay in London.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Food Fight
programme.desc: When Oscar learns that his favorite hangout, Langford's, is in financial trouble, he impulsively asks Felix to help save it, without considering the disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: I Kid, You Not

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Taffy Days
programme.desc: Oscar reconnects with many significant people from his father's life when he agrees to carry out Walter's last request to spread his ashes behind the candy factory he once owned.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: When Nicki Collingbourne is murdered in Hertfordshire, the prime suspect is a man in a high-vis jacket.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the case of 23-year-old Marta Ligman, a delicatessen worker who was found in a suitcase in London's Grand Union Canal after being attacked in 2015.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 1997 murder of Dawn Hacheney, whose husband set fire to their family home in Washington State, hoping the blaze would be treated as an accident.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the brutal murder of grandfather Peter McMahon, whose manipulative and controlling partner killed the retired civil servant in 2012 for financial gain.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murder of teaching assistant Marie Stewart, whose partner left her to decompose in the garage of their family home in Holmfirth, West Yorkshire.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Jean-Jacques Le Page Case
programme.desc: On the morning of July 24th 2009, a fire erupts at house in Plougonvelin.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murderous Lovers - Anne Bardot
programme.desc: The disturbing missing case in Paris of 4 years old.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Mysterious Disappearences in Paris - Christelle Leroy
programme.desc: On March 21th 1991, Pascale Escarfail, 19 years old, is discovered dead at her studio in the 14th arrondissement of Paris, she was raped then stabbed multiple times.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Very Strange Suicide (Muller case)

programme.title: The Case: The Diamond Thief (Frédéric Mas)

programme.title: The Case: The Hunt for Antonio Ferrara
programme.desc: The tale of a manhunt where phone taps, bates and snitches come and go.

programme.title: The Case: Lupine Arsene of the Palaces
programme.desc: A breathtaking international investigation worthy of the blockbuster “Catch Me If You Can.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: DNA and genealogy conclude that soldier Robert Lanoue murdered five-year-old Anne Pham.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Four decades after 14-year-old Rashell Ward was abducted and murdered in Red Bluff, DNA and genetic genealogy linked her killer, Coy, to the crime.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: After being reported missing, a young couple's bodies were discovered more than sixty miles apart. Looking at how the dedicated investigators eventually find the killer.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: In 1979, two young boys came home from school to find their mother's dead body in the living room. Investigating how the investigators track down the killer with no solid leads.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a young woman is found beaten to death in Wisconsin in 1984, the killer evades detection for decades. How did a revolutionary DNA method reveal his identity?

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: When a beloved local teacher is brutally attacked in her Pennsylvania home, her death shocks the community. After 27 years, dedicated investigators trace her killer.

programme.title: Terry and June

programme.desc: A mishap with a new oil portrait of Sir Dennis leads to a staged break-in at Malcolm's house.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Who's the Boss

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bus Stop Bruiser
programme.desc: When an alleged abuser goes on the lame, Dog gathers the team to bring him in. As the leads grow colder Dog's determination only grows stronger. Finally, a hot lead comes in and Dog sets the trap for his prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Luck Be A Lady
programme.desc: Dog and company head to the Big Island in pursuit of two courthouse no-shows only to find that one of them appears to be posting status updates from Southern California.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Behind the Hunt
programme.desc: The cameras are turned around, as we get a tour of life "behind the scenes" on Dog the Bounty Hunter. Using interviews with Dog and the posse, the TV crew, and never before seen footage, this is one of most revealing and heartfelt episodes of the series.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: God Looks on the Heart
programme.desc: This fugitive spells trouble for Dog in today's hunt. When the leads grow cold it's the US Postal Service to the rescue as a mail carrier lends a helping hand. Dog's team surrounds the suspected safe house and silently awaits their prey.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Big Brother
programme.desc: Today's case involves a Samoan so Dog knows that the runner's close-knit kinfolk hold the keys to bringing him in. Dog's plan is to convince family that everyone is best served if the fugitive mans up and takes care of business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star

programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.desc: Realizing local octogenarian Agatha Dimplecorn is a surprisingly-powerful combatant, Skor attempts to channel her rage towards the Posse – especially since the Dinos respect their elders too much to fight back.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch
programme.desc: At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur: Vomitrocious!/Sue Ellen Chickens Out
programme.desc: It's just a regular day until Francine starts to feel queasy, and then throws up in the cafeteria! Now Francine is afraid to go back to school. And, Sue Ellen learns that a fast-food chain is taking over the beloved Sugar Bowl.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?

programme.title: Arthur: Fernfern and the Secret of Moose Mountain/Thanks a Lot, Binky
programme.desc: Fern can't wait to climb Moose Mountain so that she can have adventures like Zutzut, the famous comic-book hero! Then, Binky decides to become "No More Mr. Nice Guy" after not getting thanked for saving Rattles from a dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth
programme.desc: With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur vs. The Piano/The Big Blow-Up
programme.desc: Arthur gets stage fright during a rehearsal. Will he be able to get through his recital without any mistakes? Then, two opinionated friends butt heads! Can Francine and The Brain put aside their differences for the good of the soccer team?

programme.title: Arthur: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues
programme.desc: When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur: Is That Kosher/Never Never Never
programme.desc: Francine's convinced that she can fast on Yom Kippur, but what about Arthur’s pizza party? D.W learns that giving gifts isn't the only way of showing you care. Featuring the voice of Joan Rivers.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Grace’s food drive isn’t going very well until Melanie offers to help. Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate – put on a movie premiere in the caboose!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff can’t find his drumsticks anywhere. Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ learns a lesson about bragging when, playing superhero CAPTAIN PICKLES, he tells everyone that he can leap over the moon!
